methods.description: Process for preparing and analyzing samples for pollen concentration and composition using chemical treatments and microscopic examination.

steps.description: Samples of 4 g to 10 g were processed for pollen. We used hydrofluoric acid treatment to remove siliceous materials from the samples.
steps.searchable_summary: apply hydrofluoric acid treatment to remove siliceous materials from samples

steps.description: A heavy liquid (HBr, KI, and Zn) with a specific gravity of 2.0 (d =2) was used to separate the spores and pollen by flotation.
steps.searchable_summary: use heavy liquid flotation to separate spores and pollen
outputs: supernatant with concentrated spores and pollen

steps.description: The supernatant was kept in other tubes, and the pollen and spore were kept in the remaining materials in the tubes after centrifugation.
steps.searchable_summary: centrifuge to separate supernatant and remaining materials
inputs: supernatant with concentrated spores and pollen
outputs: remaining materials with pollen and spores

steps.description: If there were many siliceous materials in the remaining material, then an HF acid treatment was used to remove siliceous materials.
steps.searchable_summary: apply HF acid treatment to remove remaining siliceous materials
inputs: remaining materials with pollen and spores

steps.description: The remaining material mixed with pollen and spore was filtered through a 7-μm nylon sieve with an ultrasonic treatment to make the slides clearer.
steps.searchable_summary: filter and apply ultrasonic treatment to remaining materials

steps.description: To calculate the pollen concentrations, we added Lycopodium spore tablets with a known concentration (27,637 /grains) before analyzing the samples.
steps.searchable_summary: add Lycopodium spore tablets for pollen concentration calculation

steps.description: Maher (1971) calculated the confidence intervals that could be expressed as the significance of the pollen percentages.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate confidence intervals for pollen percentages

steps.description: The presence of more than 200 pollen and spore grains per sample is the standard for a statistically significant sample.
steps.searchable_summary: determine statistical significance based on pollen and spore grain count

steps.description: Counting pollen grains until the added Lycopodium spores total more than 1,000 is the standard for samples with a low pollen content.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen grains and Lycopodium spores for low pollen content samples
outputs: pollen grain and Lycopodium spore count

methods.description: Procedure for collecting core samples and performing carbon isotope and chronostratigraphic analysis to establish a high-resolution sequence.

steps.description: The Gravity piston cores were collected in a No. 1 R / V Experiment boat in 2012 and 2010 by the Chinese Academy of Sciences Institute of the South China Sea.
steps.searchable_summary: collect gravity piston cores using R/V Experiment boat

steps.description: The length of core 12I712 is 265 cm, and that of YDY05 is 240 cm.
The samples of the 12I712 core were taken from deep basins, and those of the YDY05 core were taken from the west slope of the East Indian Range.

The carbon isotope analyses of benthic foraminifera oxygen and AMS 14 C planktonic foraminifera chronostratigraphic tests were compared to establish a high-resolution chronostratigraphic sequence of nearly 45 ka BP for the 12I712 core and 43.5ka years for the YDY05 core.
steps.searchable_summary: perform carbon isotope and AMS 14 C analysis for chronostratigraphy

steps.description: The 12I712 core was separated and described by sampling at 1-cm intervals in the laboratory, and it was then collected at 2-cm intervals; it was analyzed by pollen from 133 samples with a 340a resolution.
steps.searchable_summary: separate and describe core 12I712 at specified intervals

steps.description: The YDY05 core was separated and described by sampling at 1cm intervals in the laboratory and analyzed by pollen from 97 samples with 450 a resolution.
steps.searchable_summary: separate and describe core YDY05 at specified intervals
